history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor tile (`.`), and moving forward will bring me closer to the goal G, which is located up and to the right. No lava or wall is blocking my immediate path. Therefore, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor tile (`.`), while the lava is to my immediate east and to the north-east (which is east of the forward cell? Actually row 5 col 4 is floor, lava is at row 6 col 4 and row 6 col 5). Moving forward will place me in a safe floor cell (row 5 col 3) closer to the goal. The goal G is two cells ahead and one to the right from my current position, so moving forward now is safe.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (upwards) is a wall (#). I cannot move forward. The goal G is located to my right (east), two cells away, with a safe floor cell (.) in between. I will turn clockwise to face east, so I can then move onto the floor and reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, indicated by `^`, with the cell directly ahead (above) being a safe floor (`.`). The goal `G` is visible two cells straight ahead in the same column, with a floor cell between. Turning left or right would face a wall or lava, so the best move is to step forward onto the floor to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (one cell ahead). Moving forward will reach the goal and complete the task.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
